name: Seven Layer Salad IIi
directions: Arrange in bowl in alternate layers in order given-- lettuce, peas, onion,bell  pepper, and cheese.
On top layer, spread mayonnaise to edge of bowl to seal.
Sprinkle with bacon bits.
Cover with plastic wrap and refrigerate overnight.

name: Seven Layer Salad IV
directions: Layer in the following order in a large 4-qt bowl: Lettuce, celery onion,  peas,bacon, cheese and spre  ad the mayonnaise mixture over all, sealing the  entire top to the edges.
Refrigerate overnight without covering.
Toss before  serving.
Reduce the fat and calories by using no-fat mayonnaise,  reduced-fat cheese, and imitation low-fat bacon bits.

similar.name: Easy Cucumber, Tomato and Onion Salad

name: Caviar, Dill and Purple Onion Dip
directions: Beat the cream cheese to a smooth consistency.
Blend in the sour cream and add the remaining ingredients, blending well.
Cover and chill for at least 2 hours.
Just before serving, garnish with the egg which has been finely chopped.
Suggested dippers: cocktail rye bread, toast triangles, cucumber slices, red bell pepper strips.

similar.name: Creamy Purple Onion and Basil Dip
Country Club Sour Cream and Dill Dip

name: Creamy Purple Onion and Basil Dip
directions: Beat the cream cheese to a smooth consistency, gradually adding the basil.
Blend in the sour cream and add the remaining ingredients, blending well.
Cover and chill.
SUGGESTED DIPPERS: Unsalted Potato Chips, Water Crackers, Green Bell Peppers, Mushrooms, Brussels
Sprouts, Fennel, Smoked Deli Meats

similar.name: Caviar, Dill and Purple Onion Dip
Country Club Sour Cream and Dill Dip

name: Neighbor's Cucumber-Dill Dip
directions: Peel, seed and finely dice the cucumber.
Using a colander, squeeze out any excess water from the cucumber chunks.
Place in a bowl and blend well with the pepper and dill.
Blend in the remaining ingredients and mix thoroughly.
Cover and chill.
SUGGESTED DIPPERS: Broccoli, Cauliflower, Radishes, Carrots, Onion Crackers

similar.name: Country Club Sour Cream and Dill Dip
Caviar, Dill and Purple Onion Dip

name: Country Club Sour Cream and Dill Dip
directions: Mix the dill and lemon juice together to soften the dill.
Blend in all of the other ingredients until almost smooth.
Cover and chill.
SUGGESTED DIPPERS: Red Cabbage, Broccoli, Zucchini, Tomatoes, String Beans, Cocktail Rye Bread, Seafood, Apples, Nectarines

similar.name: Caviar, Dill and Purple Onion Dip

name: Garlic Mayonnaise Dip
directions: Mix the garlic, chopped green onion tops and bottoms, and the oil thoroughly.
Add the mayonnaise and blend the mixture well, until the oil is absorbed into the mayonnaise.
Cover and chill.
SUGGESTED DIPPERS: Asparagus, Red Bell Pepper, Broccoli, Potato
Skins, Roast Beef, Turkey

similar.name: Caviar, Dill and Purple Onion Dip
Country Club Sour Cream and Dill Dip

name: Hotter Than Heck Horseradish Dip
directions: Mix the horseradish and garlic powder blending well.
Add the sour cream and the white pepper, again blending well.
Cover and chill.
SUGGESTED DIPPERS: Rolls Of Sliced Roast Beef, Steamed Cauliflower, Bell Peppers, Potato Chips, Snow Peas.

similar.name: Country Club Sour Cream and Dill Dip
Caviar, Dill and Purple Onion Dip
Creamy Purple Onion and Basil Dip

name: Lemon-tarragon Dip
directions: Mix all the ingredients, blending well.
Cover and chill.

similar.name: Country Club Sour Cream and Dill Dip
Caviar, Dill and Purple Onion Dip

name: Creamy Broccoli Salad
directions: Combine first 7 ingredients in blender or with mixer.
Chill several hours.
Mix broccoli, raisins, green onion with chilled dressing.
Add crumbled bacon just before serving.

name: Broccoli Salad
directions: Mix dressing ingredients together in blender.
Chill for 1/2 hour.
Combine salad ingredients and toss with dressing.
Chill.

name: Sweet-and-Sour Cucumbers
directions: Combine all ingredients; marinate for at least half an hour.
With a slotted spoon, serve as a salad or a garnish.

similar.name: Easy Cucumber, Tomato and Onion Salad

name: Refrigerator Pickles
directions: Wash vegetables.
Do not peel cucumbers.
Slice all veggies.
In large bowl, combine sliced veggies, salt and celery seed.
Stir well and let stand at least 1 hour or overnight.
In a blender, combine sugar and vinegar.
Blend well to dissolve sugar.
Do not rinse the veggies.
Pack clean jars with veggies.
Do not use the 'juice' that has collected at the bottom of the bowl.
Pour vinegar solution over the veggies, wipe rims and cap jars.
Place jars in the back of your refrigerator.
Check jars the second day-if the sugar didn't dissolve all the way you may need to give them a few shakes to finish dissolving the sugar.
These wonderful pickles are ready to eat in 7 days.
(My family never waits much past the second or third day!).

similar.name: Easy Cucumber, Tomato and Onion Salad

name: Colorful Pea Salad
directions: In a saucepan, cook carrots for in water 2 minutes.
Add peas; cook 5 minutes.
Drain; rinse with cold water and drain again.
Place in bowl; add celery, cheese and onion.
Combine remaining ingredients and pour over pea mixture; toss to coat.
Refrigerate for at least 1 hour.

name: Vidalia Onion Dip
directions: Mix marinade ingredients together.
Marinate in the refrigerator overnight.
Drain onions.
Add mayo and celery seed.
Serve with crackers.

similar.name: Caviar, Dill and Purple Onion Dip
Country Club Sour Cream and Dill Dip
Creamy Purple Onion and Basil Dip

name: Hearty Black-Eyed Pea Salad
directions: In a big bowl, mix together peas, ham, tomatoes, onions, and carrot; set aside.
Add dressing ingredients to a krudit jar with tight fitting lid; shake well.
Pour dressing over salad and toss to coat.
Cover and keep in the refrigerator for at least 2 hours before serving.

name: Cousin Marcia's Herbed Tomatoes
directions: Mix all the ingredients except for the tomatoes.
Add the tomatoes and coat well.
Marinate for several Hours basting occasionally.

similar.name: Leftover Vegetables Marinated With Garlic and Thyme
Easy Cucumber, Tomato and Onion Salad

name: Layer Pasta Vegetable Salad
directions: Cook frozen vegetables as directed on pkg untill veg are crisp and tender.
Spoon evenly into ungreased 13 x 9 baking dish.
Sprinkle with onions.
Cover and refrigerate for 1 hour.
In a small bowl combine mayo sugar and lemon juice; blend well.
Spoon mixture over chilled veg with pasta and gently spread to cover.
Arrange lettuce evenly over top.
Sprinkle cheese and crumbled bacon over top of lettuce.
Cover and refrigerate at least 1 hour.

name: Marinated Tomato Salad
directions: Arrange tomatoes in serving bowl; sprinkle with parsley.
Combine remaining ingredients in a jar with tight fitting lid and shake well.
Pour over tomatoes.
Cover and refrigerate for 30 mins.

similar.name: Leftover Vegetables Marinated With Garlic and Thyme

name: Cucumber and Tomato Salad
directions: Peel and slice cucumbers.
Slice tomatoes.
Mix all ingredients.
Chill and serve.

similar.name: Easy Cucumber, Tomato and Onion Salad

name: Zucchini and Tomato Salad
directions: Combine zucchini tomatoes green onions and cilantro in bowl and toss to mix.
Combine remaining ingredients and pour over vegetables tossing to coat.
Cover and chill at least 1 hour before serving.

similar.name: Easy Cucumber, Tomato and Onion Salad

name: Creamy Broccoli Salad
directions: Put cut broccoli and cauliflower in medium mixing bowl with chopped green onion, and bacon.
Whisk together spices and all ingredients of dressing and pour over veggies.
Stir in cheddar.
This salad is best made the day before serving.
It is very good!

name: Bodacious Broccoli Salad
directions: Place bacon in a large, deep skillet.
Cook over medium high heat until evenly brown.
Drain, and crumble.
In a large bowl, combine broccoli, cheese, bacon, sunflower seeds and onion.
Prepare the dressing in a small bowl by whisking together the red wine vinegar, sugar, pepper, salt, mayonnaise and lemon juice.
Combine dressing with salad.
Cover, and refrigerate until ready to serve.

name: Vegetable Marinade with Tangy Dressing
directions: Heat together vinegar, pepper, salt, sugar and oil until dissolved; set aside to cool Place vegetables in large container and pour dressing over mixture and refrigerate.

similar.name: Leftover Vegetables Marinated With Garlic and Thyme

name: Broccoli Mushroom Salad
directions: Steam vegetables for 3 to 4 minutes.
Drain and rinse under cold water to stop cooking.
Drain well.
Place in a large bowl along with mushrooms and green onions.
Whisk together dressing ingredients.
Pour over vegetables.
Toss well.
Chill for 6 to 8 hours, stirring occasionally.

name: Broccoli and Mushroom Salad
directions: In a large bowl toss together broccoli mushrooms scallions and feta.
In a cup mix together stock lemon juice oil garlic pepper and majoram.
Pour over broccoli mixture and toss to coat well.

name: Broccoli Crunch Salad
directions: Combine first 5 ingredients in a salad bowl.
Combine dressing ingredients and mix with salad.
Refrigerate until ready to serve.

name: Easy Cucumber, Tomato and Onion Salad
directions: Place cut up veggies in glass bowl.
Mix remaining ingredients together and pour over veggies.
Refrigerate at least one hour (longer is better).
Serve with slotted spoon so that liquid remains in bowl.

name: Leftover Vegetables Marinated With Garlic and Thyme
directions: If any of the vegetables were originally cooked with butter or other seasonings, quickly (about 30 sec) immerse them in boiling water and remove; you'll have to do this in batches. I use a common fold-up metal vegetable steamer for this but with enough water heated in the pan to cover the veggies; you could also just use a strainer if you have one the right size.
Immediately dip vegetables into cold water to stop from over-cooking, then pat dry.
Whisk 2 Tbs water with the vinegar thru salt to combine.
Whisk in oil in a slow steady stream.
Refrigerate, covered, overnight.
Serve at room temperature.

name: Marinated Zucchini and Mushrooms
directions: Add mushrooms, zucchini, and red pepper in a plastic bag set in a deep bowl.
In a small bowl, mix the lemon juice, oil, sugar, salt, tarragon, pepper, and garlic together.
Pour marinade over the vegetables in the bag; seal bag, shake around to coat well.
Marinate vegetables in the refrigerator for 8 hours or overnight, turning bag occasionally.
To serve: pour vegetables and marinade into serving dish; serve with toothpicks.

similar.name: Leftover Vegetables Marinated With Garlic and Thyme

name: Pasta and Broccoli Salad
directions: Cook the pasta according to package directions until al dente.
Rinse under cold running water until the pasta cools.
Drain and transfer to a serving bowl.
Combine the pasta with the remaining ingredients and toss well.
Cover and refrigerate until needed.

name: Broccoli Salad
directions: Cut bunches of broccoli in to large bite size pieces.  Save some of the stems but only the sweet center pieces.Add raisins, sunflower seeds, and bermuda onion.  Fry the bacon till it is crisp.  Drain, cool and then crumble it into the salad.
For the dressing combine Miracle Whip, sugar and vinegar.  Use wire whisk to combine ingredients until smooth.  Pour over salad and stir ingredients together.
Refrigerate for 2-4 hours and then serve.
I've doubled and tripled this recipe before for large parties and it goes over very well.
